metadata.description: RavenClaude — a private marketplace of opinionated Claude Code plugins. Starts with ravenclaude-core (the Team Lead + specialists pattern) and grows to include domain-specific plugins for Power Platform, finance, EdTech, and Salesforce work.

plugins.name: ravenclaude-core
plugins.description: Domain-neutral Claude Code plugin: 13 specialist agents (architect, coders, reviewers, designer, documentarian, deep-researcher, project-manager, partner-success-manager, prompt-engineer, etc.), team-lead dispatch playbook, format/lint/test gates, contribution-staging workflow, and templates for memos, runbooks, design specs, RAID logs, and partner-success artifacts.

plugins.name: power-platform
plugins.description: Microsoft Power Platform specialist team — 9 expert agents (canvas/Power Fx, Power Automate + custom connectors, Dataverse modeling/security, model-driven apps, pac CLI + ALM, tenant governance/DLP, PCF, Copilot Studio + AI Builder, Power Pages) plus 9 veteran-level skills imported from Daniel Kerridge's claude-code-power-platform-skills (MIT) — including a 17-doc dataverse-web-api reference, dataverse-plugins, PCF controls, Code Apps, plan-with-team collaborative planning, code-review audits, and visual-qa. Designed for professional makers, not click-by-click tutorials.
